Home / Services / Drainage Solutions

Drainage Solutions

Effective drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage in Indianapolis.

Indianapolis' climate, with its heavy rainfall and freeze-thaw cycles, can wreak havoc on foundations and landscaping. JAM Excavating offers comprehensive drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage. We diagnose drainage problems and design custom systems to effectively manage stormwater runoff. Our services include installing French drains, culverts, swales, and catch basins. We understand the importance of proper drainage in preventing basement flooding, soil erosion, and foundation damage. We assess your property's unique drainage needs and recommend the most effective and cost-efficient solutions.

Whether you're experiencing water pooling in your yard, basement leaks, or erosion problems, JAM Excavating can help. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting drainage solutions. Protect your investment and prevent costly repairs with our expert drainage services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site inspection and problem diagnosis.
  2. 02 Step 2: Drainage system design.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation of drainage components.
  4. 04 Step 4: Testing and quality assurance.

Benefits

  • Protection from water damage
  • Prevention of basement flooding
  • Erosion control and soil stabilization
  • Improved property value

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the signs of poor drainage?

Signs of poor drainage include water pooling in your yard, basement leaks, soil erosion, and foundation cracks.

What types of drainage solutions do you offer?

We offer a variety of drainage solutions, including French drains, culverts, swales, and catch basins, tailored to your property's needs.

How can drainage solutions protect my property?

Proper drainage solutions prevent water damage, basement flooding, soil erosion, and foundation damage, safeguarding your investment.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with drainage solutions? Contact us today.
